fields.MotionBlurIntensity: Controls the strength of motion blur, disabled entirely if set to 0%.
fields.BloomIntensity: The Bloom effect causes a glow to appear around bright objects in the scene, disabled entirely if set to 0%.
fields.AmbientOcclusionIntensity: Adds shading in corners and area that'd receive less light. Controls the strength of Ambient Occlusion, disabled entirely if set to 0%.
fields.ScreenSpaceReflections: When enabled, any parts of the scene currently visible to the camera will reflect off shiny surfaces in realtime.
fields.Antialiasing: Smooths out jagged edges on objects. Some may not work or be suitable for VR.
